title: Keyall System
body:
**KeyAll – Automatic Crate Key Distribution**

**KeyAll** is a lightweight and efficient Minecraft plugin that automatically distributes **crate keys to all players** on the server. It is perfect for servers that want to reward their players regularly without requiring manual actions from admins.

The plugin can automatically give keys to online players and works well together with many crate plugins. This makes it great for events, rewards, or keeping players active on your server.

**Features**

• Automatically gives crate keys to all online players

• Compatible with many crate plugins

• Lightweight and optimized for performance

• Fully configurable

• Supports modern Minecraft versions

**Benefits**

• Keeps players active and motivated

• Great for server events and rewards

• Easy setup through the config file

• Stable and efficient

**Compatibility**

• Minecraft versions: 1.21+

• Platforms: Paper / Spigot / Bukkit

• Java: Java 21

**Configuration**

All important settings can be customized in the config.yml, for example:

Time between key distributions

Messages sent to players
Sound effects

**Note**

This plugin is designed to provide an automatic reward system for Minecraft servers and works best together with crate plugins.
